zh.Charles, Colony of Maryland, British Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fiedler Cage於1627年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親John Cage43歲，母親Mary Clifford38歲。他於1652年與Susanna Annie Hall在美國馬里蘭州查爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年2月12日在美國馬里蘭州查爾斯享年49歲。

zh-hans.Charles, Colony of Maryland, British Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fiedler Cage于1627年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，他的父亲John Cage43岁，母亲Mary Clifford38岁。他于1652年与Susanna Annie Hall在美国马里兰州查爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年2月12日在美国马里兰州查爾斯享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from Middle English, Old French cage ‘cage, enclosure’ (from Latin cavea ‘container, cave’), denoting someone who lived by or was the keeper of a cage, in the sense ‘lock-up, prison for petty offenders’.
English: alternatively, a variant of   Keech  .

variants.name: Keech
meanings: nickname for an fat person, from Middle English cach, caiche, cage, kech, a word of unexplained origin but presumably the antecedent of modern English dialect keech (variant catch) ‘lump of congealed fat; fat of a slaughtered animal rolled up into a lump (in preparation for sending to the chandler or tallow maker to make wax)’.
variant of Kedge, a nickname either from Middle English kegge, kigge ‘cheerful, pleasant, agreeable, merry’, or from an unrecorded Middle English kegge ‘belly’, for a pot-bellied person.

variants.name: Cager
meanings: English (Sussex): occupational name for a maker of cages or a jailer, Middle English cager (from Old French cagier), an agent derivative of Cage .
English: alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived by a cage, equivalent to atte Cage (see Cage ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Fiedler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Armin, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhardt, Alfons, Ernst, Gerhard, Gottfried, Hannelore.

German: occupational name for a professional or amateur fiddle player, from Middle High German videlære, German Fiedler (Yiddish fidler). The instrument (Old High German fidula) is named from Late Latin vitula. This surname is also found in Poland, Czechia, Hungary, Slovakia, and Slovenia (see also below). Compare Fiddler .
Germanized form of Polish, Czech, Slovenian, and Slovak   Fidler  , a surname of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Fiddler
meanings: English: from Middle English fitheler(e), fideler(e) ‘fiddler, one who plays a stringed instrument’ (Old English fithelere).

English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Old French phrase vis de leuu ‘wolf's face’, from Old French vis (from Latin visus) ‘face’ + leuu (from Latin lupus ‘wolf’). Hunfridus Uis de leuu and Hunfridus Vis de lupo, for example, are recorded in the Domesday Book of 1086. Videlu would have become Vidloe, then Vidler, thus becoming confused with Fiddler.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Yiddish fidler ‘fiddler, one who plays a stringed instrument’.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1658: Charles, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Charles, Maryland, United States

en.lifeSummary: When John Fiedler Cage was born in 1627, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Cage, was 43 and his mother, Mary Clifford, was 38. He married Susanna Annie Hall in 1652, in Charles, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 February 1676, in Charles, Maryland, United States, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fiedler Cage est né en 1627, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cage, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mary Clifford, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Annie Hall en 1652, à Charles, Maryland, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 février 1676, à Charles, Maryland, États-Unis, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fiedler Cage 1627 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cage 43 und seine Mutter Mary Clifford 38. Er hat 1652 in Charles, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten Susanna Annie Hall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Februar 1676 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Charles, Maryland, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fiedler Cage è nato il nel 1627 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Cage, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mary Clifford, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Annie Hall nel 1652, nel Charles, Maryland, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1676, nel Charles, Maryland, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fiedler Cageが1627年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Cageは43歳，母Mary Cliffordは38歳であった。1652年にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州チャーレスでSusanna Annie Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年2月12日にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州チャーレスで49歳で死去した。

ko.Charles, Colony of Maryland, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스
ko.lifeSummary: John Fiedler Cage(이)가 1627년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cage(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Clifford(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1652년 미국 메릴랜드 주 찰스에서 Susanna Annie Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 2월 12일 미국 메릴랜드 주 찰스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fiedler Cage родился в 1627 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Cage было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Clifford, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Annie Hall в 1652 г. в местности чарльс, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 февраля 1676 г. в местности чарльс, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Susanna Annie Hall en 1652, en Charles, Maryland, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1676, en Charles, Maryland, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 49 años.
